name: @singularity/plugin-debug-op-wedge-watchdog
description: Op-wedge watchdog: a main-only scheduled job that sweeps every worktree's CLI op markers and, for a `./singularity {build,check,push}` still alive past its budget, captures forensics from the LIVE wedged process and files one deduped Debug → Reports signal per (worktree, op, pid). Includes the cli-op-wedge report-kind renderer and the budget/capture config.
